content_of_post_to_comment: The reason I feel like a failure is because I just never did hard shit like simple things as waking up early. Writing down daily tasks then facing the things you been avoiding.. all this are just signals trying to make you confident and stronger but you choose not to and no wonder at the end you feel dumb, weak, confused and behind in life. And from inside you know you have to do the necessary things but you avoiding making excuses or feeling like something is wrong with you. And this time just goes and goes and you feel more and more rotten from inside.
comment: The part about avoiding the small things like waking up early or writing tasks down hits differently because those habits are often less about productivity and more about rebuilding trust with yourself. At the same time, beating yourself up can become another form of avoidance. Sometimes the first win is just doing one uncomfortable thing today, even if it's tiny.
